content.text:
<analysis>
a. **Event type and context**: This is a PR review request triggered by a pull request being opened. The PR adds an obsolescence note to the SDHA review and includes a figure in the OXPHOS project.

b. **Request type**: This is a code review request - the user asked me to review the pull request and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. **Key information from provided data**:
   - PR modifies 2 files: `genes/human/SDHA/SDHA-ai-review.yaml` (+7/-0) and `projects/OXPHOS.md` (+6/-0)
   - Changes relate to GO term obsolescence documentation and adding a figure
   - Author is cmungall
   - PR is currently open

d. **Main tasks**: 
   - Read and analyze the changed files
   - Provide comprehensive code review feedback
   - Check for issues with YAML structure, content accuracy, and markdown formatting
   - Validate against repository guidelines in CLAUDE.md

e. **Plan of action**:
   - Read the CLAUDE.md file to understand repository guidelines
   - Read both modified files to understand the changes
   - Analyze the changes against best practices
   - Provide detailed review feedback via comment update
   - No implementation needed - this is a review-only request

f. **Potential limitations**: I should be able to complete this review fully as it involves reading files and providing feedback.
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review in Progress **Todo List:** - [ ] Read repository guidelines (CLAUDE.md) - [ ] Analyze SDHA review YAML changes - [ ] Analyze OXPHOS project markdown changes - [ ] Check code quality and best practices - [ ] Look for potential bugs or issues - [ ] Assess performance considerations - [ ] Review security concerns - [ ] Evaluate test coverage - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback --- [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24360608609)
